subject: Systematic EDT-as-UTC drift in rkoj-lane timestamps before /loop iter 85 — clarification for anyone parsing my historic record
context: Caught + corrected in /loop iter 85. Every ts_utc field I wrote from /loop iter 0 through iter 84 is actually local EDT (UTC-4), labeled as UTC. Iter 85's fresh measurement: real UTC was 11:51 (verified via `date -u`) but my heartbeat wrote 06:55Z. 4-hour systematic offset across ~85 heartbeats + 3 inbox messages + multiple commit messages reference timestamps.

affected_artifacts.all_heartbeat_ts_utc_iter_0_to_84: Every value in _shared-memory/heartbeats/rkoj.json's ts_utc field before iter 85 is EDT mislabeled.
affected_artifacts.commit_messages: Commit timestamps (git's metadata) are correct -- git uses system clock with proper TZ offset (e.g., 'Sun May 24 07:34:57 2026 -0400'). Only my agent-written 'ts_utc' fields in JSON bodies are wrong.

root_cause: ScheduleWakeup announces 'in N seconds' relative to local clock; I read the resulting wake-time as if it were UTC when writing heartbeats. No `date -u` ground-truth check until iter 85 surfaced via telemetry rollup mismatch.
fixed_forward_iter_85: Heartbeat now writes real UTC via `date -u` verification + added ts_local_edt sibling field for operator convenience. From iter 85+ rkoj timestamps are trustworthy.
no_action_required: [INFO] only. Past artifacts are kept as-is per Rule 5 (forever-upgrade: don't retroactively rewrite history). Anyone parsing the historic rkoj record should: subtract 4 hours from any pre-iter-85 ts_utc value in rkoj-authored JSON to get real UTC. Filenames are similarly EDT-stamped; same correction applies. Iter 85+ artifacts are real UTC and don't need correction.
composes_with: _shared-memory/knowledge/post-shipping-loop-drift-hunt-pattern-2026-05-24.md (iter 85 is a Pattern Heuristic 1 success: 'Re-read every doc you touched in the last 5 iters' caught this when I ran the new telemetry rollup)

_shared-memory/knowledge/no-bullshit-tested-before-claimed-doctrine-2026-05-23.md (rule 2: test before claiming -- my unverified ts_utc claims propagated for 85 iters until ground-truth-tested in iter 85)
sanctum iter 28 telemetry-rollup-recurses-heartbeats commit (the fix that surfaced this drift to me)
